scripts.frontend:format: prettier --write --ignore-unknown --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json "*.config.{js,mjs,ts}" "LPWork/Tools/**/*.mjs" "LPWork/Tests/browser/**/*.mjs" "LPWork/Frontend/Resources/**/*.ts" "App/**/*.{ts,css}" && eslint . --fix && stylelint "App/**/*.css" --allow-empty-input --fix
scripts.frontend:check: npm run frontend:typecheck && npm run frontend:lint && npm run frontend:stylelint && prettier --check --ignore-unknown --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json "*.config.{js,mjs,ts}" "LPWork/Tools/**/*.mjs" "LPWork/Tests/browser/**/*.mjs" "LPWork/Frontend/Resources/**/*.ts" "App/**/*.{ts,css}"
